modified_files.change: Replace in-place `recall_at_k` definition with a re-export from `eval.metrics`. No signature/behavior change.
Replace in-place `precision_at_k` definition with a re-export from `eval.metrics`. No signature/behavior change.

untouched_but_depended_on: agents/eval/ground_truth.py (RelevantDoc, QueryLabel, RelevanceLabel -- imported, not modified)

agents/eval/baselines/graphrag_lite.py (unchanged; its retrieve_documents output shape is what metrics.py's arm-level helpers consume, but no import needed there since its own test file already imports recall_at_k/precision_at_k from the baselines modules, which still work post-refactor)
test_command: cd agents && uv run pytest eval/test_metrics_recall_precision.py eval/test_vector_rag_baseline.py eval/test_vector_rag_rerank.py eval/test_graphrag_baseline.py eval/test_ground_truth.py -q
backward_compatibility_strategy: metrics.py is the single canonical implementation; vector_rag.py and vector_rag_rerank.py import and re-bind the same function objects (not copies), so identity and behavior are preserved for all existing callers and tests.
